name: Solar Panel Installation Calculator
seo_description: Calculate kwp_necesario, paneles_ud with our free solar panel installation calculator. Just enter consumption_diario_kwh, hsp_dia, power_panel_w and get results
example_label: Calculatete solar installation for daily consumption of 15 kWh with 4.5 HSP.

range_hints.consumo_diario_kwh: Consumo average diario of the vivienda
range_hints.hsp_dia: Horas Sol Pico according to ubicación: 3-6 HSP/día

result_context: To {consumption_diario_kwh} kWh/day with {hsp_dia} HSP need {power_total_w}W of paneles ({paneles_ud} paneles of {power_panel_w}W). Baterías: {capacity_kwh} kWh to 1 day.
formula_display: Power = consumption ÷ HSP; Paneles = power ÷ W_panel; Baterías = consumption × days
steps: Calculatete power necessary: 15 kWh ÷ 4.5 HSP = 3.33 kW = 3333W
Baterías 1 day: 15 kWh × 1.20 = 18 kWh (Consider depth descarga 50%: 36 kWh)
mistakes: Not Consider pérdidas of the system (inversor, cables, temperature)
Dimensionar batteries without Consider depth of descarga
Not orientar paneles correctly (sur in hemisferio norte)
description: Solar PV system sizing based on consumption and peak sun hours.
desc: Solar Panel Installation Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
